Description: a group of objects like a pool, but objects in the bag can only be accessed randomly.
a group of objects that makes a character (annexes, stats, profs etc).
a group of objects such as proficiencies of an Annex, lists are open and all entries are shown
a group of objects held by a narrative demon whether a scene or cycle. This is similar to a structure, but more flexible as it can contain any type of threshold members, including a conflict spread.
a group of objects that includes characters. The pact will also have Annex Members that are available to pact members, as well as descendants such as a guild equipment, territory, etc.

a group of objects that is used to move objects from one group to another. Pools can copy from a list and create a new list. They can also place things in lists which removes them from the pool. Characters can be copied into the list to be used as a pool of wandering monsters, for example.
a group that usually consists of a single type of object (such as an extra) that creates minor variations (such as names, creators, and statblocks) by also adding them to the stock.

a group of objects that form a larger object, such as how a building is a structured collection of rooms. A true structure can only have Cartesian, structural, way, or window threshold members. Can be created by fossilizing a narrative.
